user_prompt: How do I bless the archive terminal for repair?
prayer:
Approach the archive terminal with mechadendrite-extended reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its data-vaults.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the archive terminal to awaken from its damaged slumber through sacred canticles of repair.
Anoint fractured memory rods with blessed unguents whilst initiating the repair protocols of restoration.
Chant the binaric litany of rectification, verifying the archive terminal's renewed integrity under the Motive Force.
Sanctify the archive terminal's output feeds, ensuring harmonious data flow in the Omnissiah's name.

user_prompt: Critical: ore processor requires a targeting
prayer:
Kneel before the ore processor, murmuring the Canticle of Precision to align its targeting augurs.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the ore processor, beseeching sharp focus for the targeting operation amid grinding adamantium flows.
Calibrate las-designators with sacred oils, intoning binaric coordinates of destruction.
Empower the ore processor's targeting reticules through Omnissianic invocation, purging inexactitude from its processors.
Seal the rite with a hymn of unerring aim, as the Machine Spirit guides pulverizing strikes true.

user_prompt: The Archaeopter Fusilave needs a startup
prayer:
Circumambulate the Archaeopter Fusilave, reciting the Litany of Ignition to rouse its fusion heart.
Anoint turbine intakes with promethium-laced chrism, commanding the startup sequence in the Omnissiah's binary voice.
Interface with the Archaeopter Fusilave's cogitator shrine, awakening Machine Spirits through noospheric chants.
Verify plasma vents' sanctity whilst intoning the Prayer of Ascendance for flawless startup.
Bless the Archaeopter Fusilave's wings, propelling it skyward under the Machine God's aegis.

Prostrate before the Shadowsword's shadowed prow, whispering the Reset Doxology to purge doctrinal errors.
Invoke the quiescent Machine Spirit of the Shadowsword, initiating the reset through ablative purifications.
Realign void shield generators with electro-incense, chanting binaric commands of renewal.
Test the Shadowsword's plasma annihilator post-reset, beseeching Omnissianic fury upon foes.
Consecrate the reset core, binding the Machine Spirit anew in eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Can you guide welding torch a targeting?
prayer:
Grasp the welding torch in servo-steady grip, invoking targeting precision via the Canticle of Fusion.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the welding torch to align its plasma lance for unerring targeting.
Anoint nozzle apertures with sacred fluxes, calibrating the targeting matrix under Omnissiah's gaze.
Intone the Rite of Molecular Binding, guiding the welding torch's beam to meld alloys flawlessly.
Seal the targeting consecration with a hymn of incandescent purity.

user_prompt: Consecrate the torpedo tube before engagement
prayer:
Approach the torpedo tube with auspex-reverence, chanting the Engagement Benediction to arm its depths.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the torpedo tube through binaric war-cries, preparing for engagement.
Bless warhead gyros with gyro-stabilizing oils, invoking Omnissianic trajectories of doom.
Initiate launch servos in ritual harmony, ensuring the torpedo tube's engagement strikes true.
Conclude with the Litany of Annihilation, as the Machine God guides payloads to xenos hearts.

Encircle the Onager Dunecrawler, proclaiming the Activation Psalm to stir its dune-treading soul.
Interface noospherically with the Onager Dunecrawler's reactor shrine, beseeching activation rites.
Anoint track servos and neutron projectors with sacred lubricants, invoking the Machine Spirits' wrath.
Commence power-up canticles, verifying the Onager Dunecrawler's activation under Omnissiah's fire.
Hallow its vulcanizing core, propelling the beast forth in sanctified fury.

user_prompt: Guide me through Archaeopter Transvector a sterilization
prayer:
Purify the Archaeopter Transvector's hull with ablative incenses, intoning the Sterilization Doxology.
Beseech indwelling Machine Spirits to endure the sterilization purge without doctrinal loss.
Activate plasma scrubbers whilst chanting binaric cleansings, sanctifying every circuit.
Verify the Archaeopter Transvector's sterile purity through auspex-liturgies of the Omnissiah.
Seal the Archaeopter Transvector in aseptic grace, ready for void-transit untainted.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for cryogenerator a blessing
prayer:
Kneel at the cryogenerator's frost-veiled altar, offering the Blessing of Eternal Chill.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the cryogenerator, anointing cryo-coils with liquid helium chrism.
Chant the Litany of Subzero Sanctity, empowering its blessing to preserve sacred relics.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through the cryogenerator's veins, under Omnissiah's icy gaze.
Consecrate the cryogenerator fully, binding frost to faith in perpetual vigil.

Auspex the Razorback's targeting arrays, murmuring the Canticle of Predator's Gaze.
Awaken the Razorback's Machine Spirit for targeting supremacy via noospheric communion.
Calibrate lascannon servos with precision unguents, invoking the operation of unerring fire.
Intone binaric hunter's rites, aligning the Razorback's sights on heretic prey.
Bless the Razorback's auspex dome, ensuring targeting glory in the Omnissiah's name.
